name: unimatrix
description: Universal AI memory persistence and cross-device continuity layer

scripts.clean: turbo run clean && rm -rf node_modules .turbo dist
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.mobile:build: cd apps/mobile && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$(pwd)/../node_modules/.bin:$PATH EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 eas build --profile production --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.mobile:build:all: cd apps/mobile && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$(pwd)/../node_modules/.bin:$PATH EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 eas build --platform all --profile production --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.mobile:build:ios: cd apps/mobile && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$(pwd)/../node_modules/.bin:$PATH EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 eas build --platform ios --profile preview --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.mobile:build:android: cd apps/mobile && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$(pwd)/../node_modules/.bin:$PATH EAS_BUILD_NO_EXPO_GO_WARNING=true EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 eas build --platform android --profile production --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.mobile:build:preview: cd apps/mobile && PATH=$(pwd)/node_modules/.bin:$(pwd)/../node_modules/.bin:$PATH EAS_BUILD_NO_TELEMETRY=1 eas build --profile preview --non-interactive --no-wait
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test

_eas_mobile_note: Use these for the React Native / Expo app (apps/mobile). They guarantee the correct working directory. See apps/mobile/README.md and ACCOUNTS_AND_SECRETS.md for details. Direct npx eas-cli from here is the #1 cause of 'expo-modules-autolinking' errors and huge uploads. NOTE: iOS production requires $99/yr Apple Developer membership (currently unaffordable for user) - :ios alias uses preview/simulator (free). Android full prod ok.
